title: job-1
prompt: Primary request: Flat tech infographic in a clay-orange (#d97706) and slate-gray (#1f2937) dev-tool aesthetic on a warm off-white paper background (#faf9f5). Bilingual zh-en labels, clean Inter-style sans-serif typography. Title at top: '最后一公里的鸿沟  The Last-Mile Gap'. Layout: split scene. Left half shows a terminal window (dark slate background, monospaced green/orange text) captioned 'CLI demo 命令行演示': inside it a LangGraph agent logs '▶ planning → call_tool(search) → answer'. Right half shows a realistic SaaS product UI: a CRM/editor window with a table of records, a sidebar, a form, a highlighted row, captioned '真实产品  Real product UI'. Between the two halves is a large broken bridge / chasm drawn in thin orange lines, with four problem callouts dangling over the chasm as small clay-orange sticky-note cards: (1) 'agent 怎么读到当前上下文?  How does the agent read UI context?' (2) 'tool call 是 JSON, 用户要看真组件  JSON → real React components?' (3) '高风险操作要人类确认  Human approval for risky ops?' (4) 'React state ↔ agent state 双向同步?  Bidirectional state sync?'. Bottom footer strip: a narrow clay-orange banner with white text 'CopilotKit + AG-UI fills this gap · 填平这一公里'. Minimal, editorial, magazine-quality technical illustration. No 3D, no photos, no gradients except subtle paper texture. All text must be crisp and fully legible.
